mapper.sql: callback_id, callback_type, task_id, dispatch_request_id, assignment_id, agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, attempt_no, fencing_token, accepted, ignored_reason, message, progress_percent, error_code, error_message, payload_json, occurred_at, processed_at, duplicate, idempotency_key, callback_fingerprint, replay_detected, previous_task_status, new_task_status, previous_dispatch_status, new_dispatch_status
mapper.insert: insert into task_callbacks () values ( #{record.callbackId}, #{record.callbackType}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.dispatchRequestId}, #{record.assignmentId}, #{record.agentId}, #{record.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{record.agentSessionId}, #{record.attemptNo}, #{record.fencingToken}, #{record.accepted}, #{record.ignoredReason}, #{record.message}, #{record.progressPercent}, #{record.errorCode}, #{record.errorMessage}, coalesce(coalesce(cast(#{record.payloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{record.occurredAt}, #{record.processedAt}, #{record.duplicate}, #{record.idempotencyKey}, #{record.callbackFingerprint}, #{record.replayDetected}, #{record.previousTaskStatus}, #{record.newTaskStatus}, #{record.previousDispatchStatus}, #{record.newDispatchStatus} ) on conflict (callback_id) do update set callback_type = excluded.callback_type, task_id = excluded.task_id, dispatch_request_id = excluded.dispatch_request_id, assignment_id = excluded.assignment_id, agent_id = excluded.agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, attempt_no = excluded.attempt_no, fencing_token = excluded.fencing_token, accepted = excluded.accepted, ignored_reason = excluded.ignored_reason, message = excluded.message, progress_percent = excluded.progress_percent, error_code = excluded.error_code, error_message = excluded.error_message, payload_json = excluded.payload_json, occurred_at = excluded.occurred_at, processed_at = excluded.processed_at, duplicate = excluded.duplicate, idempotency_key = excluded.idempotency_key, callback_fingerprint = excluded.callback_fingerprint, replay_detected = excluded.replay_detected, previous_task_status = excluded.previous_task_status, new_task_status = excluded.new_task_status, previous_dispatch_status = excluded.previous_dispatch_status, new_dispatch_status = excluded.new_dispatch_status
mapper.select: select * from task_callbacks order by processed_at desc nulls last, occurred_at desc nulls last limit #{limit}
